# Purchase Sub State

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:4a76106c0e4c88e1c02c8154015248e9004c76e75b7a349b497bd14d20bc1808
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module allows to add a substate to purchase order.
For each purchase order state you can define a substate.
With this module you can define substate which allow you to extend purchase workflow.
For example, you can add substate "waiting for legal documents" if
the order can not be validated without this document (purchase a car for example).

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

1. Go to \*\* Settings > Technical > Database Structure \*\* and Add "Base substate".
   : If necessery you can add "target State values" (ex define a substate for "cancel"
     state).
     Substate sequence is very important.
2. Create a purchae order and check if the substate are displayed on the header of
   form view. Check if you can't set substate defined for purchase if sate is a RFQ.
